arxiv.name: adhd-executive-function-hci
arxiv.query: all:ADHD AND all:"executive function" AND (cat:cs.HC OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.LG)

arxiv.name: adhd-assistive-technology
arxiv.query: all:ADHD AND (all:"assistive technology" OR all:"digital intervention" OR all:"mobile app" OR all:"self tracking")

arxiv.name: neurodiversity-productivity-tools
arxiv.query: all:neurodiversity AND (all:productivity OR all:planning OR all:accessibility OR all:HCI)

pubmed.name: adult-adhd-digital-support
pubmed.query: adult ADHD digital intervention executive function

pubmed.name: adhd-assistive-technology-reminders
pubmed.query: ADHD assistive technology reminders smartphone app

rss.name: medrxiv-adhd-search
rss.note: Broad feed; discovery script filters ADHD-related titles/summaries.
